sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Energy Transfer LP (ET) Outpaces Stock Market Gains: What You Should Know
feed.summary: Energy Transfer LP (ET) stock closed up 1.12% at $17.15, outperforming the S&P 500's daily gain. The company is anticipated to report earnings of $0.36 per share, a 24.14% year-over-year growth, and revenue of $26.11 billion for the upcoming release. With a Zacks Rank of #3 (Hold) and a Forward P/E ratio of 11.04, ET appears to be an attractive investment compared to its industry.

feed.title: ICICI Bank Allots 1,185,510 Equity Shares Under Employee Stock Option Scheme
feed.summary: ICICI Bank has allotted 1,185,510 equity shares with a face value of ₹2.00 each under its Employee Stock Option Scheme-2000 on January 13, 2026. This allotment, approved by two Executive Directors with delegated authority, demonstrates the bank's commitment to employee compensation and regulatory compliance. The information has been communicated to both BSE and NSE, ensuring transparency in their employee compensation structure.

feed.title: FTA Aviation Series C Preferred Shares Remain A Hold Despite Juicy 8.1% (NASDAQ:FTAIN)
feed.summary: FTAI Aviation Preferred Series C shares (FTAIN) are advised to remain a hold, despite an 8.1% yield, due to a high probability of redemption in 2026. Redemption at par would reduce the effective annualized yield to 4.8%. The recommended strategy is to collect the two remaining dividends and then sell above $25 before the anticipated redemption, or hold until called.

feed.title: AXT (NASDAQ:AXTI) Stock Price Down 8.4% - Here's What Happened
feed.summary: AXT (NASDAQ:AXTI) shares dropped 8.4% during mid-day trading on Monday, with approximately 5.42 million shares traded, significantly below its average daily volume. Analyst ratings for AXT are mixed, with an average "Hold" rating and an average price target of $13.75, while the company remains unprofitable despite exceeding recent EPS and revenue estimates. Insider selling has also occurred, with executives and directors selling shares valued at over $3.3 million in the past 90 days.

feed.title: Coeur Mining’s Pivotal Acquisition: Forging a North American Metals Powerhouse
feed.summary: Coeur Mining is pursuing a pivotal $7 billion acquisition of New Gold Inc., with shareholders voting on January 27th. This merger aims to create a significant North American metals producer, focusing on geopolitical stability and diversifying its portfolio with a substantial copper component. The combined entity is projected to achieve strong financial targets, potentially leading to inclusion in major market indices.

feed.title: CMC Q1 Fiscal 2026: Record Steel Margins & Construction Solutions EBITDA - News and Statistics
feed.summary: Commercial Metals Company (CMC) reported strong financial results for its first quarter ended November 30, 2025, with North America Steel Group's adjusted EBITDA increasing by 57.9% and the Construction Solutions Group achieving record first-quarter EBITDA, up 74.7% year-over-year. These improvements were driven by favorable market conditions, expanded margins, and successful acquisitions. The company holds a positive long-term outlook, anticipating continued growth from infrastructure demand and strategic initiatives despite expected seasonal softness in Q2.

feed.title: Net worth of new P&G CEO Shailesh Jejurikar could nearly double
feed.summary: Procter & Gamble's new CEO, Shailesh Jejurikar, has been given a significant performance incentive, including options on over 130,000 company stock shares. His net worth is projected to nearly double to over $28 million due to new stock grants and options. Jejurikar's compensation package includes a $1.6 million salary, potential incentive pay, and a long-term incentive award valued at $14 million.

feed.title: Exxon remains “interested” in sending assessment team to Venezuela- report (XOM:NYSE)
feed.summary: Exxon Mobil is reportedly still interested in sending an assessment team to Venezuela to evaluate oil infrastructure and other assets. This development follows recent outreach from U.S. President Donald Trump to oil executives. The information comes from an unnamed source cited by Reuters.

feed.title: General Motors CEO Mary Barra says she still believes in electric vehicles
feed.summary: General Motors CEO Mary Barra maintains her belief in electric vehicles despite the Trump administration eliminating EV tax credits, which cost GM $6 billion. She envisions a future where robust charging infrastructure and technological advancements, like AI and Google Gemini, make EVs more appealing and affordable to consumers. GM has also relocated its global headquarters to the historic Hudson's Detroit building to better suit its collaborative business structure.

feed.title: Wells Fargo reverses fraud decision days after WFAA report; grandmother gets nearly $15,000 back
feed.summary: Wells Fargo reversed its decision regarding a fraud case involving an 83-year-old Dallas woman, restoring her nearly $15,000 savings. This reversal occurred days after a WFAA report highlighted her 16-month struggle to resolve check fraud. The bank's change of heart comes after public attention was drawn to the case.

feed.title: Grocery Outlet plans first Virginia store
feed.summary: Grocery Outlet Holding Corp. announced its first planned Virginia store in Falls Church, set to open on February 12th, marking its expansion into a 16th state. This expansion comes as the company faces financial difficulties, including a lowered fourth-quarter sales forecast due to delays in food assistance benefits during a government shutdown, impacting same-store sales and earnings per share. Despite positive foot traffic, the retailer has seen a decline in units per transaction and average price per item.

feed.title: Comtech CEO optimistic about 911 segment under Allerium name
feed.summary: Comtech President and CEO Ken Traub expressed optimism for the company's public-safety segment, now operating under the name Allerium. Traub believes Allerium is well-positioned to increase its market share in the 911 sector throughout 2026 and beyond due to technological advancements and financial stability. This outlook points to anticipated positive momentum for the segment.

feed.title: The Technical Signals Behind (MGRD) That Institutions Follow
feed.summary: This article analyzes the technical signals for Affiliated Managers Group Inc. 4.200% Junior Subordinated Notes Due 2061 (MGRD), indicating a neutral sentiment across all time horizons favoring sideways action. Institutional trading strategies are outlined, including position trading, momentum breakout, and risk hedging, alongside multi-timeframe signal analysis with support and resistance levels. The analysis, generated by AI models, also details key findings, risk-reward scenarios, and current price signals for MGRD.

feed.title: CoStar Group stock price target lowered to $75 by KBW on guidance
feed.summary: KBW lowered its price target for CoStar Group (NASDAQ:CSGP) to $75 from $100 while maintaining an Outperform rating. This adjustment follows CoStar's "disappointing" preliminary 2026 guidance and medium-term targets, though KBW believes these still indicate strong earnings expansion. Other financial institutions like Wells Fargo, BMO Capital, Citizens, Goldman Sachs, and BofA Securities have also adjusted their price targets for CoStar Group based on its recent financial guidance and strategic plans, particularly regarding Homes.com.

feed.title: Does Weakening Margins And Profitability Trends Change The Bull Case For Equifax (EFX)?
feed.summary: Equifax is facing pressure due to declining adjusted operating margins, lower return on invested capital, and lagging earnings per share growth, despite revenue increases. This has led analysts to reassess the company's investment narrative, with an average price target of US$265.43, down from previous estimates. Investors are now focused on Equifax's ability to control expenses and manage rising legal and compliance costs to support its long-term growth story.

feed.title: Erasca price target raised to $11 from $3 at Clear Street
feed.summary: Clear Street has increased its price target for Erasca (ERAS) from $3 to $11, reiterating a Buy rating, following promising early Phase 1 trial data for ERAS-0015. The drug showed clinical responses at a lower dose than a comparable treatment, daraxonrasib, across various tumor types and RAS mutations. Analysts noted the drug's clean safety profile and linear pharmacokinetics as key differentiators, suggesting potential superiority over RMC-6236 as a pan-RAS molecular glue.

feed.title: BioMarin hires AI leader to help accelerate rare disease therapies
feed.summary: BioMarin has appointed Arpit Davé as Executive Vice President, Chief Digital and Information Officer, effective January 12, 2026. Davé will lead the company's enterprise technology strategy, data science, and digital transformation, aiming to accelerate R&D, manufacturing, and commercial operations. With over 20 years of IT and AI experience in biopharma, including from Amgen, Bristol Myers Squibb, and Merck, his role is expected to drive innovation and support the delivery of life-changing rare disease therapies.

feed.title: CORT Investor ALERT: Corcept Therapeutics Inc. Investigated
feed.summary: Block & Leviton is investigating Corcept Therapeutics Inc. (Nasdaq: CORT) for potential securities law violations after its shares fell more than 50% on December 31, 2025. This drop occurred because the FDA issued a Complete Response Letter for relacorilant, citing a lack of sufficient evidence for a favorable risk-benefit assessment. Investors who purchased Corcept Therapeutics common stock and have incurred losses are urged to contact Block & Leviton to learn about recovering their losses.

feed.title: (DCBO) Strategic Equity Report (DCBO:CA)
feed.summary: This strategic equity report for Docebo Inc. (DCBO:CA) provides AI-generated trading signals and ratings. It includes short-term and long-term trading plans with buy and short recommendations, target prices, and stop losses. The article also lists numerous recent reports on Docebo Inc.

feed.title: Charles River Laboratories Provides Business Updates
feed.summary: Charles River Laboratories announced key strategic moves including the acquisition of K.F. (Cambodia) Ltd. to strengthen its DSA supply chain, and exercising an option to acquire PathoQuest SAS to enhance its NAMs capabilities. The company also appointed Dr. Namandjé Bumpus as Chief Scientific and Innovation Officer and provided a preliminary 2026 outlook, noting improved DSA demand trends. These initiatives aim to advance drug development solutions, optimize supply chains, and foster innovation in the biopharmaceutical industry.

feed.title: Best Buy Co. Inc. Stock: Quiet Strength Or Value Trap In A Cooling Electronics Cycle?
feed.summary: Best Buy Co. Inc. has demonstrated quiet strength, outperforming the retail sector despite macro headwinds, while trading at a conservative earnings multiple. The stock's recent upward trend prompts questions about whether it's a late-cycle opportunity or a value trap in a slowing consumer electronics market. Analysts remain cautiously optimistic, acknowledging strong execution and control while noting exposure to discretionary spending fluctuations.

feed.title: |【即時新聞】Main Buywrite ETF宣佈每月分配金，投資人需注意關鍵日期
feed.summary: |Main Buywrite ETF (BUYW) 宣布每單位將分配0.0716美元的每月分配金，預計於2025年12月29日支付。投資者需注意，符合資格的股東必須在2025年12月23日（即除息日）前登記在冊。該ETF的股價在消息公布後略有下跌，收盤價為14.27美元。

feed.title: Banco Bradesco Renews Related-Party Merchant Services Agreement With Cielo
feed.summary: Banco Bradesco has renewed its merchant intermediation agreement with related-party Cielo on January 12, 2026. This annually auto-renewed contract, approved under internal governance procedures and market terms, reinforces the operational integration between Bradesco and Cielo. Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, rates BBD as an Outperform, citing strong technical indicators, reasonable valuation, positive market momentum, and an attractive dividend yield.

feed.title: Huntington Bancshares acquires Atlanta M&A firm ahead of retail expansion
feed.summary: Huntington Bancshares has acquired Atlanta's M&A firm TM Capital. This acquisition comes after a previous failed attempt two years prior and is part of Huntington's strategic expansion in the Atlanta market, preceding a planned retail expansion. The article highlights this business move and upcoming local events.

feed.title: Energy Transfer prices $3B bond offering (ET:NYSE)
feed.summary: Energy Transfer (ET) announced the pricing of a $3 billion bond offering. The offering is split into three tranches: $1 billion in senior notes due 2031 at 4.55%, $1 billion due 2036 at 5.35%, and $1 billion due 2056 at 6.30%. The offering prices for these notes are 99.830%, 99.933%, and 99.842% of face value, respectively.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. (NYSE:JPM) Shares Down 1.4% - What's Next?
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. (NYSE:JPM) shares dropped 1.4% on Monday to roughly $324, with increased trading volume, influenced by a pre-earnings pullback and concerns over a White House proposal to cap credit-card rates and a DOJ probe into Fed Chair Powell. Despite these headwinds, the company's fundamentals remain strong with a recent EPS beat, a steady dividend, and an average analyst target price near $333.90. JPMorgan's own research now forecasts a rate hike in Q3 2027, suggesting a "higher-for-longer" interest rate environment that would generally support bank net interest margins.

feed.title: Atmos Energy Corp.: The Quiet Infrastructure Giant Powering America’s Gas Future
feed.summary: Atmos Energy Corp. is positioned as a critical infrastructure giant in natural gas delivery, quietly powering daily life for millions across the US by operating and modernizing vast networks. The company's business model focuses on reliable gas supply, safety upgrades, and adaptability for a lower-carbon future, making it an investable and defensible asset despite the energy transition debates. Its strategic footprint in growth markets, pure-play focus on natural gas distribution, and long-term modernization efforts provide a competitive edge and drive shareholder value through regulated returns.

The fund also recently declared a quarterly dividend of $0.3713, an increase from its previous dividend. Several institutional investors adjusted their holdings in FYX during the second quarter.

feed.title: Bank of America (NYSE:BAC) Stock Price Down 1.2% - Time to Sell?

While the stock benefits from positive sentiment, including a large drop in short interest and an AI-driven bond opportunity flagged by BofA research, policy risk from a proposed credit-card interest cap by President Trump is exerting negative pressure. Analysts currently rate BAC as a "Moderate Buy" with an average target price of $59.82.

feed.title: Merck & Co., Inc. (NYSE:MRK) Trading Down 1.2% - Here's Why

The company missed quarterly EPS estimates but maintains strong profitability, and recently increased its quarterly dividend to $0.85. Analysts have mixed ratings but boosted price targets, with a consensus target of $113.25.

feed.title: Wells Fargo (WFC) Reports Earnings Tomorrow: What To Expect
feed.summary: Wells Fargo (WFC) is set to announce its earnings results tomorrow before market open. Analysts anticipate a 5.8% year-on-year revenue growth to $21.65 billion and adjusted earnings of $1.69 per share. The company has a current average analyst price target of $100.88, compared to its current share price of $95.20.

feed.title: Ceva Powers BOS Semiconductors’ Next-Gen ADAS Platforms
feed.summary: BOS Semiconductors has licensed Ceva's SensPro AI DSP architecture for its new Eagle-A standalone ADAS System-on-Chip (SoC). The Eagle-A SoC is designed for advanced driver assistance and autonomous driving systems, integrating high-end NPU, CPU, and GPU along with sensing interfaces for camera, LiDAR, and radar fusion. Ceva's SensPro AI DSP will optimize LiDAR and radar pre-processing to reduce latency and enable efficient handling of raw sensor data in these automotive applications.

feed.title: Inside the C-suite at CES with Omnicom, Stagwell, Publicis and WPP
feed.summary: This article provides an inside look at how top executives from major holding companies like Omnicom, Stagwell, Publicis, and WPP approached the 2026 Consumer Electronics Show (CES). It highlights their goals, strategic initiatives—such as Omnicom's first public debut post-IPG acquisition, WPP's Agent Hub, and Stagwell's The Machine launch—and their big bets on emerging tech trends, particularly the pervasive impact of AI and the resurgence of robotics, on shaping business in the coming year.

feed.title: Adaptive Biotechnologies Touts clonoSEQ MRD Growth, Targets Companywide Profitability in 2026
feed.summary: Adaptive Biotechnologies highlighted the significant growth of its clonoSEQ minimal residual disease (MRD) franchise and outlined a strategy for its immune medicine (IM) unit at the J.P. Morgan healthcare conference. The company reiterated its expectation to achieve companywide profitability, specifically positive adjusted EBITDA and positive free cash flow, in 2026. clonoSEQ is now a substantial business exceeding $200 million, with robust clinical revenue growth and expanding patient adoption.

feed.title: Eagle Point Income Co Inc - net asset value per share as of Dec 31, 2025 estimated between $13.25 and $13.35 - SEC filing
feed.summary: Eagle Point Income Co Inc has estimated its net asset value per share as of December 31, 2025, to be between $13.25 and $13.35, according to a recent SEC filing. The company is an externally managed, diversified closed-end management investment company primarily investing in junior debt tranches of collateralized loan obligations (CLOs). Its investment objective focuses on generating high current income and capital appreciation.

feed.title: Crescent Energy Schedules Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Earnings Release and Conference Call
feed.summary: Crescent Energy (NYSE: CRGY) announced it will host a conference call and webcast on Thursday, February 26, 2026, at 10 a.m. CT to discuss its fourth quarter and full-year 2025 financial and operating results and its 2026 outlook. The company plans to release results after market close on Wednesday, February 25, 2026. The release and supplemental slides will be available on Crescent Energy's website.

feed.title: Dollar General Corp. stock outperforms competitors on strong trading day
feed.summary: Dollar General Corp. (DG) stock saw a positive trading day, outperforming its competitors and the broader market indices like the S\&P 500 and Dow Jones Industrial Average. Despite its strong performance on this particular day, the stock still shows a year-to-date decline, though it has narrowed the gap with its competitors.

feed.title: Why APTIV HLDS LTD (APTV) Could Beat Earnings Estimates Again
feed.summary: Aptiv PLC (APTV) is positioned for another earnings beat in its upcoming quarterly report, building on a strong history of surpassing estimates. The company has a positive Zacks Earnings ESP of +11.44% and a Zacks Rank #2 (Buy), indicators that historically lead to earnings surprises. Aptiv is expected to release its next earnings report on February 2, 2026.

feed.title: Comerica Inc.: Can a Legacy Regional Bank Be Rebuilt Like a Platform Product?
feed.summary: Comerica Inc. is attempting to transform itself from a traditional regional bank into a digitally driven, relationship-first financial services product platform. The bank is retooling its specialization into digitally enabled business banking, advisory-heavy wealth management, and niche vertical solutions for middle-market companies. This strategic shift aims to create more cohesive and configurable offerings to compete against national giants and digital-first rivals, with key differentiators being its relationship-based model, specialization in the mid-market, and conservative risk discipline.

feed.title: Amgen says MariTide helped trial patients maintain weight loss
feed.summary: Amgen's experimental obesity drug MariTide has shown promise in helping patients maintain weight loss and reducing blood sugar in diabetes patients, according to new trial data. The company announced that a significant majority of patients who achieved initial weight loss with MariTide maintained it during a 52-week extension study, with improved tolerability at lower or quarterly doses. Unlike existing weekly injectable weight-loss drugs, Amgen's drug is an antibody linked to peptides, allowing for less frequent dosing and a different mechanism targeting GLP-1 and blocking GIP receptors.

feed.title: Is KeyCorp (KEY) Priced Attractive After Sector Concerns On Regional Bank Risks?
feed.summary: KeyCorp's valuation is analyzed using an Excess Returns model and Price-to-Earnings (P/E) ratio, considering recent concerns around regional banks. While the Excess Returns model suggests the stock is 39.3% undervalued at an intrinsic value of $34.70 per share, its P/E ratio of 24.55x is above industry and peer averages, indicating it might be overvalued through that lens. Simply Wall St's proprietary Fair Ratio for KeyCorp is 18.51x.

feed.title: Is It Too Late To Consider Dollar General (DG) After A 112% One Year Rally?
feed.summary: Dollar General (DG) has seen a significant 112% rally over the past year, prompting an analysis of its current valuation. A Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) model suggests the stock is undervalued by 13.2% at US$148.86, with an intrinsic value of US$171.52 per share. However, its current P/E ratio of 25.65x is higher than industry and peer averages, and Simply Wall St's Fair Ratio of 23.39x, indicating it is overvalued by this metric.

feed.title: Is Equifax (EFX) Offering Value After A 9.8% Share Price Decline?
feed.summary: Equifax (EFX) has experienced a 9.8% share price decline over the past year, prompting an analysis of its valuation. While a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) model suggests the stock is undervalued by 43.1%, trading at a discount of $389.79 per share, its Price-to-Earnings (P/E) ratio of 41.20x is higher than both the industry average and Simply Wall St's Fair Ratio, indicating it appears expensive on earnings. The article concludes that investors should consider both valuation approaches and company-specific factors to determine Equifax's true value.

feed.title: Evaluating Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing (NYSE:TSM) After Strong Recent Momentum And Mixed Valuation Signals
feed.summary: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing (TSM) has shown strong recent momentum with significant share price returns over one, three, and twelve months. While current valuations present a mixed picture, with one narrative suggesting the stock is 7% overvalued based on a fair value of US$310, the market's P/E ratio for TSM is still below the industry average, implying a potential discount. The company is highlighted as a central pillar of the AI revolution, but risks like geopolitical tensions and cost pressures are noted.

feed.title: Day One Announces Preliminary 2025 OJEMDA™ Net Product
feed.summary: Day One Biopharmaceuticals announced preliminary unaudited 2025 OJEMDA™ net product revenue of $155.4 million, representing 172% year-over-year growth, and provided 2026 U.S. net product revenue guidance of $225 - $250 million. The company also outlined key corporate priorities for 2026, including expanding OJEMDA's commercial opportunity, advancing pipeline programs like Emi-Le and DAY301, and completing enrollment in the pivotal Phase 3 FIREFLY-2 clinical trial. These updates precede their presentation at the J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference.

feed.title: CBIZ Talent Solutions Fills Critical Controller Position in Just 4 Weeks
feed.summary: CBIZ Talent Solutions successfully filled a critical controller position for a client in the healthcare industry in just four weeks. The role required specific healthcare experience and inventory management skills, which CBIZ addressed by utilizing targeted recruitment strategies including LinkedIn Recruiter and engagement with passive candidates. This efficient placement ensured minimal disruption for the client and resulted in a high-performing candidate.

feed.title: Adicet Bio, Inc. (NASDAQ:ACET) Sees Large Decline in Short Interest
feed.summary: Adicet Bio, Inc. (NASDAQ:ACET) experienced a significant 95.7% decrease in short interest during December, falling to 642,724 shares. The biotech company, which specializes in cell therapies for oncology, has a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts with an average target price of $92.50. Despite the reduced short interest, the stock recently traded down 2.7% to $7.81 after reporting an EPS of ($4.64), missing analyst estimates.
